# task\-mcp\-server — Implement the MCP server \(thin wrappers over core\)
status: done  priority: 2  scope: scope-core

Expose the core ledger over MCP stdio \(spec §14\) so coding agents can drive Waystation directly\. Tools are THIN wrappers over existing core functions — no new behavior, no reimplemented writes\. The SDK \(@modelcontextprotocol/sdk@1\.29\.0\) is already proven on Bun by test/mcp\.test\.ts \(McpServer \+ Client round trip over InMemoryTransport\)\. Build src/mcp/ \(a buildServer\(\) factory that registers the tools on an McpServer\) plus a \`waystation mcp\` command that connects it over StdioServerTransport\.

## Acceptance
- src/mcp/server\.ts exports buildServer\(root\): McpServer with all tools registered; keep transport wiring out of it so tests can use InMemoryTransport\.
- \`waystation mcp\` starts the server on a StdioServerTransport \(no \-\-json; stdio only\)\.
- Read tools: get\_status, get\_next\_task, get\_task\{id\}, get\_brief\{task,budget?\}, render\_prompt\{task,agent,role?\}, list\_issues, get\_inbox\{agent,since?\}, validate\_ledger\.
- Write tools \(through the single write path only\): claim\_task\{id,agent\}, release\_task\{id,agent\}, finish\_task\{id,agent\}, create\_handoff\{task,from,to?,summary?\}, post\_message\{thread,from,to?,kind?,body\}, create\_issue\{\.\.\.\}\.
- create\_issue needs a NEW core function core/issue\.ts createIssue\(\) \(write path via withLedgerLock \+ writeJsonAtomic \+ appendEventUnlocked 'issue\.created'\); there is no issue\-create in core yet\. Add an id\-slug rule \+ zod on input\. Keep IssueRecord permissive schema for reads\.
- Every tool returns the CommandResult/Diagnostic shape \(src/core/result\.ts\) as structured content, so MCP callers get the same \{ok,data,errors,warnings\} contract as the CLI\. Map thrown MutationError/RecordError to their codes; never leak a raw stack\.
- Tool input schemas use zod raw shapes \(as in test/mcp\.test\.ts registerTool\)\.
- bun:test: a Client over InMemoryTransport lists the tools, calls get\_next\_task, and calls claim\_task \(verifying the task moved to in\_progress \+ a claim exists\)\. Extend test/mcp\.test\.ts\.
- typecheck \(tsc \-\-noEmit\), biome check, and \`waystation validate\` all clean; full \`bun test\` green\.
